name: rafo-gps-time-display
description: RAFO Calibration Center Oman time display with a Netlify frontend and Express GPS proxy backend

scripts.check: node --check gps-proxy.js && node --check receiver-protocol.js && node --check time-source-service.js && node --check tests/protocol-harness.js && node --check tests/time-source-harness.js && node --check tests/runtime-sync-harness.js && node --check scripts/build-static.js && node --check api-client.js && node --check status-monitor.js && node --check fallback-card.js && node --check runtime-sync.js && node --check dashboard-render.js && node --check ui-controls.js && node --check main.js && node --check official-time.js
scripts.test: npm run test:protocol && npm run test:time-sources && node ./tests/runtime-sync-harness.js
